response.justification: Maria brings 15+ years of software development experience with strong recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Her testing craftsmanship background (TDD, test frameworks, workshops) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well with the stack. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited evidence of Kotlin, but her breadth and demonstrated ability to pick up new stacks make these low-risk.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple recent roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, a rare and explicitly required skill
Strong testing and software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops and OSS test libraries)
concerns: Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced (Java present but dated)
Significant portfolio time in DLang, a niche language not in the target stack
